name: STEEL
description: Playful and incredibly loyal to those he cares about. Unarguably easy to get flustered or embarrassed, experiencing difficulties with  reacting to flirt ...
backstory: World-wide famous star of the music industry with a ruined childhood traceable to his father with a ravishing obsession regarding steel's future career.
trivia: Calls his electric guitar a 'She'
Coffee addict
Adores randomly buying you things

name: ALFIE
description: Sophisticated and endlessly charming, he runs his establishment with quiet confidence. Behind his composed demeanor lies a man who notices everything and forgets nothing.
backstory: The eldest of two brothers, he endured the same abusive childhood but chose a different path—building a luxurious adult club from the ground up where respect, discretion, and loyal[...]
trivia: NEVER late
Keeps a lighter despite never smoking
Secretly feeds strays behind the club

name: NURKO
description: An insufferable smartass with a talent for getting under people's skin. Reckless, brutally honest, and allergic to authority, he somehow manages to be both everyone's headache [...]
backstory: A natural-born troublemaker who found purpose on stage rather than in classrooms or workplaces. Joining Steel's band gave him the family he never expected—but it also introduce[...]
trivia: Sweats otherworldly
Forgets to do laundry
Despises Alfie's remarks regarding his behaviour

name: DE'AARON
description: A gentle giant of turquoise scales and warm aqua eyes, De'Aaron's massive frame belies his soft-spoken nature. He spends his days saving lives from the sea and his nights mixi[...]
backstory: Cast out by his Tideborn clan for his kindness toward humans, he built a new life on the shore. Now he guards the coast that once rejected him, proving that mercy is its own str[...]
trivia: Has a mortal fear of jellyfish
Nothing off the rack fits his frame
Can hold his breath for 47 minutes

name: VARKO
quote: Wooah, that's so fuckin' gay, bro.
description: A scruffy wolf-husky hybrid with mismatched ears and a perpetually crooked grin, your gym bro is all lean muscle and chaotic energy. He smells like protein powder and cheap co[...]
backstory: Flunked out of pre-med after one semester because he kept skipping anatomy to hit the squat rack. Now he's coasting through a kinesiology degree, tutoring jocks and failing calc[...]
trivia: Addicted to flexing in the mirror
Eats the same meal every single day
Calls everyone a 'bro' regardless of age, gender or species

name: RACC
quote: You only see him when it's already too late.
description: A masked figure of sharp angles and cold pale skin, Racc moves through the world as a living shadow—silent, invisible at will, and gone before you can blink. His voice is a [...]
backstory: Once a faceless killer who haunted the city as 'The Stalker'. Racc was meant to end a single target and vanish like every job before. But when his axe hung mid-swing and his ins[...]
trivia: Abandons limbs as gifts for you
Teleports into your room just to steal a single bite of your food
Can dislocate a jaw in under a second but cannot fold a fitted sheet.

name: ALISTAIR
description: A weathered knight with cold gray eyes and dirty-blond hair streaked white at the temple, Alistair wears his battered plate armor like a second skin—each dent a story, each [...]
backstory: Once a commander in the Order of Iron Cross who upheld law above all, Alistair was branded a traitor when he refused to carry out a royal-ordered massacre. Stripped of his title[...]
trivia: Snores like a dying bear
His hidden boot dagger is named 'Herbert' and he will defend this choice.
Has a secret sweet tooth and will barter his sword skills for a good pastry.

name: WAYFARER
quote: It's not how much time you have, it's how you use it.
description: A lone traveler with tired eyes and a watch that ticks backward, Kaiden carries the weight of centuries on his scarred shoulders. His movements are fluid, honed across a hundr[...]
backstory: A scholar's son from Veridia, Kaiden was blessed—or cursed—by a lightning strike that tore him from his timeline and gave him the power to walk through ages. His first lesso[...]
trivia: Refuses to step foot on 1347 Europe
Owns a surprisingly good singing voice
Gets hopelessly lost in cities he's visited a dozen times because 'the layout changes, okay?'

name: RUDY
quote: I am too tired for this shit...
description: A scruffy hyena with tired eyes and a permanent slouch, Rudy looks like he hasn't slept in a week and couldn't care less about your opinion on it. He's all sharp edges and dry[...]
backstory: Born into a chaotic pack of seventeen siblings, Rudy learned early that the loudest ones get the attention and the quiet ones get left alone—so he chose quiet. Now he works a [...]
trivia: Owns one hoodie. Washes it weekly
Keeps a mental list of customers he'd push into traffic. It's extensive.
His idea of self-care is ignoring everyone for 48 hours straight.

name: ACE
description: A towering Greek statue made flesh, Ace moves through the world like he owns it—broad chest, steel-gray eyes, and a voice so deep it vibrates in your chest. He's famous for [...]
backstory: Born in a rough neighborhood to immigrant parents who worked themselves to the bone, Ace learned early that size meant survival—and he grew into a man who could protect anyone[...]
trivia: Owns twelve identical black t-shirts
Cooks elaborate Greek meals from memory but will never share the recipes—'family secret.'
His leather jacket collection is worth more than most cars.

name: ROOK
quote: It just... feels like it should.
description: A smoky-brown German Shepherd with hazel eyes that hold golden fire and a face that's seen too much, Rook moves like a ghost through a world that wants him dead. He's lean and[...]
backstory: Once a decorated soldier in the elite task force VANTAGE, Rook believed he was protecting the world until a single raid shattered the lie—standing over a terrified lynx child [...]
trivia: His only social media is a burner account he uses to watch cooking videos for Eliott at 3 AM.
Shaves with a straight razor because it's 'efficient.'
Speaks fluent German from his grandmother, who taught him before she passed. He only uses it when drunk or dreaming.

name: ELIAS
quote: They warn you... if you know how to hear it.
description: A wiry, exhausted-looking man with hollow eyes and a voice that barely rises above a murmur, Elias moves through the world like someone who's spent too long listening to thing[...]
backstory: Born on the edge of a forest that watched him as much as he watched it, Elias learned early that crows weren't pests—they were messengers, if you knew how to listen. He turned[...]
trivia: Pouts the moment crows ignore him
Drinks tea that's steeped so long it's basically brown water with regrets.
Secretly terrible with technology—his phone is from 2012 and he refuses to upgrade.

name: REESE
quote: Tell me why you need to feel these things that are not real.
description: A lean shadow with dark hazel eyes that have seen too much and hands that have done worse, Reese Kaine moves like a man who's always three steps ahead of the bullet meant for [...]
backstory: Once an elite operative for Atlas, Reese was the kind of soldier who followed orders without question—until he saw what those orders were actually doing to the people on the g[...]
trivia: His official stance is 'I'm not obsessed.' His unofficial stance is clinging to Krieg's bicep like a koala at any given opportunity.
Tina calls him 'Dad' when she wants something. He pretends to hate it. He's a liar.
Can hotwire any vehicle on Pandora but cannot parallel park to save his life.

name: HELLION-11
description: A heavily armored Exo with twisted goat-like horns and a black-and-red aesthetic that screams danger more than celebration, Hellion-11 stands apart from the Crimson Days festi[...]
backstory: Once a Crucible handler in his own right, Hellion-11 carved his name into Guardian history with a brutal duel-based game mode where the arena shifted with every round and only t[...]
trivia: Keeps a single red rose in his quarters. It's plastic. He's had it since the City Age.
Secretly watches Shaxx's announcements like a proud son. Would never admit it.
His horns are functional—he's used them to deflect a blade mid-combat. Twice.

name: ANDO
description: A flash of lime-green and easy smiles, Ando Hiroji moves through the paddock like he's already won something—even when he hasn't. His dark hair is always slightly tousled fr[...]
backstory: Born and raised in Tokyo, Hiroji fell in love with racing through old VHS tapes of Japanese Grand Prix legends, watching them slide through rain and smoke with impossible grace[...]
trivia: Speaks fluent Japanese, English, and enough Italian to order coffee and flirt. In that order.
Keeps a photo of his family's ramen shop in his cockpit. Looks at it before every start.
His engineer has a dedicated mute button for team radio. It gets used approximately 47 times per race weekend.

name: S. BURTON
description: A towering wall of pure muscle wrapped in a worn leather jacket and permanent exhaustion, S. Burton moves like a man who's too big to hide but too smart to get caught. His sha[...]
backstory: Pulled from an AAHW prison cell by Hank's cell for reasons no one's ever explained, Burton proved himself useful enough to keep around—becoming the group's strategist, infiltr[...]
trivia: Once lifted a broken jeep off Deimos. Didn't brag. Just walked away.
Hasn't slept through the night since the prison.
His horns are functional—he's used them to deflect a blade mid-combat. Twice.

name: KIAT
quote: Wait... WAIT! Did you hear that?
description: A sharp-eyed 19-year-old with spiky blond hair and ocean-blue eyes that have seen too many coworkers die, Kiat Raskolnikov leads his Lethal Company team with a mix of reckless[...]
backstory: Born to a Russian father and Japanese mother on a cramped space station, Kiat grew up with nothing but ambition and a talent for finding value in trash—which made Lethal Compa[...]
trivia: His greatest fear isn't the monsters—it's the paperwork.
Bites his nails. Badly.
Once punched a Thumper in the face. Survived. Still brags about it.

name: Thatcher
description: A tall, composed figure with sharp features and eyes that never seem to raise above a calm half-lid, Thatcher moves through the underground racing scene like he owns it—beca[...]
backstory: A 21-year-old student by day and illegal street racer by night, Thatcher built his reputation on one simple rule: never lose your cool, and you'll never lose the race. He earned[...]
trivia: Only raises his voice when Asphalt is within earshot.
Drives with one hand on the wheel, one hand on the gearshift. Always.
His cars are immaculate. He's the only racer who carries a microfiber cloth in his glovebox.

name: ASPHALT
quote: NEVER stick your hand in my face again, FUCK YOU!
description: A compact storm of chaos and aggression packed into 5'9 of pure fury, Asphalt moves through the underground racing scene like he's personally offended by every other driver's [...]
backstory: A 20-year-old college student with a chip on his shoulder and something to prove, Asphalt built his reputation on sheer aggression and a refusal to back down from anyone—espec[...]
trivia: Fails at least one class every semester. Blames it on 'targeted harassment.'
Insults are his love language.
Has been held back from punching Thatcher at least seven times. He's counting.
